# minio_server_config_region (Resource)

Manages MinIO server region/site name configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "minio_server_config_region" "main" {
  name = "us-east-1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Region or site name (e.g., "us-east-1", "dc1-rack2").

### Optional

- `comment` (String) Region description.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `restart_required` (Boolean) Whether a MinIO server restart is required.

## Import

```shell
terraform import minio_server_config_region.example region
```
